programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Past, Present and Future
programme.desc: A couple's Belle Island camp has a long multi-generational history within their family spanning nearly 100 years. Their camp is an ongoing focus of family life and they are now ready to make its preservation their main priority.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: A Legacy Preserved
programme.desc: The crew pay tribute to an entomologist and late matriarch of an amazing legacy in West Gardiner, Maine, by restoring two rustic cabins on her 113-acre Wakefield Wildlife Sanctuary.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: The Dixie Dog Den
programme.desc: The Cabin Masters team helps their own Matthew Dix restore his grandfather's old shed to its former glory.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Diamond in the Rough
programme.desc: After three women collectively buy a cabin they describe as 'a diamond in the rough on a pretty lot,' they are determined to prove the naysayers wrong and create the cabin of their dreams.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Love Yurts
programme.desc: In a show first, Chase and the crew are tasked with a relocation and land manifestation of a family yurt on an island on Togus Pond. The team enter uncharted waters knowing they have to move quickly before the pond freezes.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: The Suburban House: Part 1
programme.desc: Mike and Michael Jr. take things to the next level as they decide to go into business together. They purchase an outdated, suburban property and face a wonky layout, too many stairs and open-concept headaches.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: The Suburban House: Part 2
programme.desc: Mike and Michael figure out the open-concept dilemma at the Suburban House and turn their attention outside, where their plans for a spacious new deck come up short. They must quickly find a solution before the fast-approaching open house arrives.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: The Country House: Part 1
programme.desc: Mike and Michael buy a bungalow in the country that sits on five acres with a barn and two-car garage. It also has major water issues, leeching bed woes and a flooring battle that won't be swept under the rug.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: The Country House: Part 2
programme.desc: Mike and Michael rush to finish the Country House before winter hits, but their schedule and budget are tested when an open permit, left on the barn by previous owners, is discovered.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: The River House: Part 1
programme.desc: Mike finds a potential investment for Michael and himself, but the property is three-and-a-half hours away on St. Lawrence River. Things get even trickier as structural issues accumulate, causing stress levels to rise and the budget to go off the rails.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: The Hole Truth (Donuts)
programme.desc: Alton Brown takes us on a trip to Memphis to honor the original glazed doughnut that started it all.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Layers Of Goodness
programme.desc: Get ready to pile it on thick as we're talking layers of goodness that are stacked to the ceiling. We take a trip to Chicago where we meet up with Jeff Mauro to discover all the magic colors hidden inside the rainbow cake.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: I'll Have What They're Having
programme.desc: Antonia Lofaso falls in love with a sourdough cinnamon roll in Los Angeles.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: One of a Kind
programme.desc: We're talking about dishes that are unique, original and unlike anything that's come before. Alton Brown has his eye- and his stomach- set on a genuine creation called the Crab Rangoon Pizza.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Manila
programme.desc: Andrew reveals Manila's iconic foods, from slow roasted pork to chicken inasal.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Atlanta
programme.desc: In the modern city known for its southern hospitality, Atlanta's comfort food is king. From fried chicken and peach cobbler to soul food and sweet tea, Andrew Zimmern explores the iconic eats that keep the hungry heading south.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Mexico City
programme.desc: Mexico City has the most people of any city in the western hemisphere, and they all love to eat. Home to some of the best street food on Earth, Andrew Zimmern explores tasty traditions like barbacoa, chicharrone and huarache.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Warsaw
programme.desc: In Poland's capital city of Warsaw, the Slavic culture is rich and the hearty food sticks with you through the winter. From pierogi to zapiekanka to paczki, Andrew Zimmern explores the iconic eats that Poles hold as tradition.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Dublin
programme.desc: In a city celebrated for its beloved beverages, Dublin, Ireland's, food does not disappoint. Andrew Zimmern examines edible Irish icons from smoked salmon, soda bread and stew to boxty, black pudding and, of course, Guinness.

programme.desc: Hop Pop's efforts to be hailed as a hero amongst some small-town folks backfires when he stands up to the wrong family. Then, when the family is in danger, Anne must put her self-consciousness aside in order to learn the true way of the hunter.

programme.title: Amphibia: Cursed!/ Fiddle Me This
programme.desc: After Anne helps Sprig break up with Maddie, strange things start happening to them. When a popular talent competition comes to Wartwood, Hop Pop goes overboard in training Sprig to win.

programme.title: Walk the Prank: LOL the Vote
programme.desc: Chance is hoping to be voted 'class clown' for a record breaking fourth year in a row, but finds out Bailey is also vying for the title. Dusty is vying for 'most academic.'

programme.title: Walk the Prank: Dino Safari VR
programme.desc: Chance, Herman and Dusty are mesmerized by a new dinosaur virtual reality game which inspires a new set of pranks. Bailey disguises as a mind-melting robot from the future. An unsuspecting camp counselor believe he's discovered a spaceship in the woods.

programme.title: Walk the Prank: A Night Witch You'll Always Remember
programme.desc: When Bailey discovers that Clumsy Carl is going to ask her to an upcoming dance, she desperately searches for a different date and lands on Herman.

programme.title: Walk the Prank: Baby Please
programme.desc: Bailey catches Herman reading her diary and decides to get payback by pranking him.

programme.title: Walk the Prank: Party Hearty
programme.desc: Chance tries to figure out why he's the only one of his friends invited to party, while the gang pulls off a prank that makes Herman's creepy life-size doll appear to come to life just in time to scare a babysitter.

programme.title: Walk the Prank: Walk the Prank: WWE Edition
programme.desc: WWE superstars join the cast of professional pranksters to pull off some of the most outrageous pranks yet including staging a fake infomercial fiasco, making an arm wrestling video game come to life, and turning a house upside down.

programme.title: Walk the Prank: There's a New Kid in Town
programme.desc: A team of young practical jokers pull off hilarious pranks in this hidden camera series.

programme.title: Walk the Prank: Wigging Out
programme.desc: When Bailey's hairstylist is sick, a new stylist has to cut her hair. Meanwhile, Chance is trying to find a way to make Herman fly.

programme.title: Walk the Prank: A Very Vlad Joke
programme.desc: The team tries to teach Bailey's new friend Vlad the art of pulling off a great practical joke, just in time for them to pull off an epic prank involving a teacher's aide, aliens and the military.

programme.title: Walk the Prank: Slumber Party
programme.desc: A team of young practical jokers pull off hilarious pranks in this hidden camera series.

programme.title: Walk the Prank: The Wedding
programme.desc: A team of young practical jokers pull off hilarious pranks in this hidden camera series.

programme.title: Walk the Prank: Blind Date
programme.desc: The gang finds out that Uncle Will has, unknowingly, been set up on a blind date with Bailey's mom. Meanwhile, a target is hired to be on-air talent for a home shopping network owned by Chance's dad.

programme.title: Beyblade Burst Rise: Invasion! The New King!

programme.title: The Office: Weight Loss

programme.title: The Office: Baby Shower
programme.desc: Michael practices for the birth of Jan's baby by having Dwight go over possible birthing scenarios. Meanwhile, Michael tells Holly that he will pretend to dislike her for Jan's benefit.

programme.title: The Office: Crime Aid
programme.desc: Michael helps Pam get a part time job at corporate so she can afford to go to art school. After the office gets robbed, Michael decides to hold an auction to raise money for all the items lost.

programme.title: The Office: Employee Transfer
programme.desc: Pam is embarrassed when she is the only person at the corporate office wearing a costume on Halloween. Holly and Michael take the long trip to Nashua after they get some shocking news. Meanwhile, Dwight torments Andy and tries to get under his skin.

programme.title: The Office: Customer Survey
programme.desc: Dwight and Jim are shocked when they get the results of the annual customer survey report. Pam and Jim decide they want to spend every minute together using their Bluetooth phones. Meanwhile Angela and Andy pick a location for their wedding.

programme.title: South Park: Fourth Grade

programme.title: South Park: Lil' Crime Stoppers
programme.desc: After they return a missing doll to a little girl, the Park County Police Department recognizes the boys' efforts and names them Junior Deputies.

programme.title: South Park: Britney's New Look

programme.title: South Park: Krazy Kripples
programme.desc: Believing that people who are born disabled are better than those who are disabled through an accident, Jimmy and Timmy pull together a group of people like themselves and call their new club the 'Crips.'

programme.title: The Office: E-Mail Surveillance
programme.desc: The employees at Dunder Mifflin are upset when Michael starts monitoring their emails. Meanwhile, Pam suspects Dwight and Angela are having an affair. Michael later shows up uninvited at Jim's barbecue and sings karaoke.

programme.desc: When Michael takes the Dunder Mifflin crew on a motivational harbour cruise aboard a party boat on Lake Wallenpaupack, things get out of hand and Michael ends up in the brig. Meanwhile, Jim is bummed when Roy and Pam finally set a wedding date.

programme.desc: Michael demands attention from the entire Dunder Mifflin office after he has a freak accident with his George Foreman grill and Dwight begins behaving strangely following a minor car crash.

programme.title: The Office: The Secret

programme.title: The Office: The Carpet

programme.title: The Office: Boys and Girls

programme.title: Movie: The Girl He Met Online
programme.desc: A woman with uncontrollable bipolar behaviour may be a risk for the man she's been seeing.

programme.title: Movie: Killer Coach
programme.desc: A high school senior on her way to the Olympic Trials starts working with a new swim coach. When it becomes clear that the coach's teaching methods might not be the best thing for her, the coach does everything she can to destroy the athlete.

programme.title: Movie: Pool Boy Nightmare
programme.desc: A woman has a brief affair with pool cleaner, but quickly turns down his continued advances. Insulted at being rejected, he starts dating her high school age daughter, using her as an unsuspecting pawn in a twisted game of revenge.

programme.title: Movie: Beware of Mom
programme.desc: When a new family moves into their cul-de-sac, a teenager quickly makes friends with the family's daughter. But their adventures grow wild and dangerous and things soon spiral out of control.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Pressed for Crime
programme.desc: Investigators have few suspects when a young waitress is mysteriously murdered in her apartment. A call from a pawn shop miles away shifts the investigation southward.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Finger Pane
programme.desc: Texas City police fear the work of a serial killer after two young women are found dead in the same field. They have little to go on until a third woman comes forward claiming she's the one who got away.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Gold Rush
programme.desc: A man calls 911 saying his girlfriend shot herself, but the autopsy reveals that the gunshot wound was not self-inflicted.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Four on the Floor
programme.desc: A Native American woman is found murdered less than 10 miles from where a male Native American was murdered two years earlier. Police begin to wonder if a serial killer is on the loose.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Elemental Clue
programme.desc: Police fear a serial killer is on the loose when two women in the same town are murdered.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Moss Not Grass
programme.desc: A young woman is found dead on a golf course in the Bahamas, and the evidence leads police to two suspects.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Chief Suspect
programme.desc: The wife of a police officer is murdered in her own home. After a decade a newly formed cold case unit took a new look at the case, and using a fragment of a 911 call, they caught the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Water Hazard
programme.desc: The victim had ingested a massive amount of cyanide. An unlikely clue, a flaw on a mailing envelope, exposed a murderer who was willing to kill innocent people to get the one person he wanted.

programme.title: Forensic Files: As the Tide Turns
programme.desc: A woman is found dead. A man's version of events was at variance with the evidence, so investigators turned to forensic science, hoping to determine if this was a botched robbery, or cold-blooded murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Tight Leash
programme.desc: Law enforcement officials turn to forensic scientists when they experience difficulty in their attempts to figure out how a stalker was able to steal his victim's personal photographs and obtain the code to her home security system.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Frozen Assets
programme.desc: When a respected business owner is brutally attacked and killed, investigators have to determine if it was a robbery gone wrong or a calculated murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: House Hunting
programme.desc: When a successful real estate agent is brutally murdered, panicked townspeople begin looking over their shoulders and locking their doors.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Stranger in the Night
programme.desc: When his mother is found dead, a Delaware man tells a story so improbable that police don't believe it. While there's no evidence directly tying him to the crime, investigators are certain he knows more than he's saying, until forensic testing is done.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Kidnapping
programme.desc: A family vacation turns into a manhunt for a missing wife and baby. When their worst fears are confirmed, police must switch gears to find a killer. With computer tracing, finger and palm print analysis, and DNA testing, investigators can solve the crime.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bump in the Night
programme.desc: Investigators find a shoe impression in the mud outside a victim's home that they hope will lead them to the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sole Searching
programme.desc: It's not only a fingerprint which can link a killer to a crime; a shoe print can be just as telling. Armed with little else, police hoped the shoe impressions found at a Lansing, Michigan crime scene would put their investigation back on track.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Just Desserts
programme.desc: A Florida couple is found dead just days before their planned move out of state. A known criminal's driver's license found at the crime scene seems too good to be true.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sunday's Wake
programme.desc: When a little girl got sick and died, investigators were stumped. Scientists would travel half-way around the world before finding the answer in two unlikely places.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Disrobed
programme.desc: A married couple was found shot to death in their suburban home. Investigators thought they had pin-pointed the killer and his motive until trash revealed the shocking truth and the true killer's identity.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Driven to Silence
programme.desc: An attractive young hairstylist is murdered in her South Carolina salon, and police are at a loss. A tiny hair and a DNA test force police to take another look nearly a decade after the crime.

programme.title: Very Scary People: Dr. Death: A License to Kill
programme.desc: For nearly two decades, a physician-turned-murderer left a trail of death and mayhem across two continents.

programme.title: Very Scary People: Dr. Death: You're Next
programme.desc: Suspicious illnesses and deaths followed this once-trusted physician-turned-killer from hospital to hospital for nearly two decades and across two continents.

programme.title: Very Scary People: Jim Jones: Unholy Massacre
programme.desc: More than 900 Americans died in an isolated jungle in northern Guyana in November 1978. Jim Jones, has gone down in history as a madman who drove his followers to suicide. But the truth is more complicated and more tragic than that.

programme.title: Very Scary People: Jim Jones: Unholy Massacre
programme.desc: More than 900 Americans died in an isolated jungle in northern Guyana in November 1978. Jim Jones, has gone down in history as a madman who drove his followers to suicide. But the truth is more complicated and more tragic than that.

programme.desc: News of the day mixed with lifestyle segments, plus weather, sports and enlightening guests.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: Capturing the Unabomber
programme.desc: In a new interview, Ted Kacyznski's brother, the man who ultimately turned him in to the authorities, takes us behind the hunt that led to the capture of 'The Unabomber.'

programme.title: How It Really Happened: The Bombing of Oklahoma City: The Explosion (Part 1)
programme.desc: In 1995, Timothy McVeigh, a 26-year-old U.S. army veteran, detonated a truck bomb outside a federal building in Oklahoma City. We take a look back at the events that led up to the largest domestic terrorist attack in the history of the United States.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: The Bombing of Oklahoma City: McVeigh's Shocking Confession (Part 2)
programme.desc: In an exclusive prison interview, Timothy McVeigh himself describes how events in his personal life and the world around him inspired him to kill his fellow Americans. We also hear from survivors of the bombing and family members of the victims.

programme.title: Beyond Reasonable Doubt: The Atlanta Bombings
programme.desc: In 1996, one person was killed and hundreds were injured when a bomb went off at the Atlanta Olympics. Five more bombs would be detonated, and the FBI, ATF and GBI realize they are looking for a serial bomber.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Postal Mortem
programme.desc: On October 15, 1985, two bombs rocked Salt Lake City and resulted in two deaths. A third explosion occurred the next day, but this time the victim survived. Police believed that the survivor is more than an innocent by-stander.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Deadly Delivery
programme.desc: A serial bomber was waging a vendetta against the legal profession: A judge, two attorneys and even a courthouse had been targeted. Investigators used evidence from the bombs to lead them to the perpetrator.

programme.title: Bering Sea Gold: Pain in the Ice
programme.desc: Following the arctic storm that drove everyone to shore, Shawn embarks on a marathon dive, Kris unveils a diving relay with The Reaper's new diver Shaunna, and Emily takes another desperate shot at TOMCOD gold.

programme.title: Bering Sea Gold: Total Meltdown
programme.desc: Suffering the icy burn of possible defeat, Kris wrecks his 3-diver relay plan and abandons his crew. Shawn is forced to question TOMCOD. Emily returns home to Claim 14. Vernon gambles on the edge of the ice.

programme.title: Bering Sea Gold: Dredged Up: Cold Man and the Sea

programme.title: Dr. 90210: First Look

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Fights, Friendships and Fashion Week Part 1
programme.desc: Kim becomes too friendly with Khloe's ex and Khloe must put her foot down and set some boundaries. Kylie prepares to debut her Kylie Cosmetics collaboration with Balmain at Paris Fashion Week.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Fights, Friendships, and Fashion Week Part 2
programme.desc: In the aftermath of their fight, Kim and Kourtney head to Armenia to baptize their kids. After evaluating her lifestyle, Kourtney considers making a major change. Kris is beside herself when she learns that Kylie is too sick to work in Paris.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Date My Daughter
programme.desc: When Kris is at a sexual peak in her relationship, she feels guilty Khloé is going through a dry spell and tries to push her to date again. Scott panics over an upcoming speaking engagement.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: In the Blink of an Eye
programme.desc: Khloè wrestles with whether to send her daughter to Cleveland to visit Tristan. Kylie considers undergoing a scary medical procedure. Scott and Khloè plan their next prank on Kris that will top all previous pranks.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Surprise, Surprise
programme.desc: During a whirlwind week of birthdays, Khloe and Kim plan an epic surprise to celebrate Corey. Khloe must choose between freezing her eggs and making embryos with her ex.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Family Matters
programme.desc: When Kim reveals she no longer wants to host the annual Christmas Eve Party, the family feuds over holiday plans. Scott struggles to talk about his parents when reunited with a relative from his past. Khloe fills in as Kris' assistant and tension rises.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Growing Pains
programme.desc: While Khloe plans a baby shower for her best friend, Malika wrestles with the reality of becoming a single parent. Kourtney gets into cuddling and breakouts of her comfort zoom by forcing herself to be more affectionate.

programme.title: The Daily Pop: Live Emmys Special
programme.desc: We're previewing TV's biggest night: The Emmys. We're breaking down what the stars will be wearing, how this year's show will be different and much more.

programme.title: Movie: What to Expect When You're Expecting
programme.desc: Five interconnected couples come to understand love and that life does not always deliver what you expect.

programme.title: Movie: Forgetting Sarah Marshall
programme.desc: After a musician is dumped by his actress girlfriend, he travels to Hawaii to heal. When he arrives in Hawaii, he discovers that his ex and her new boyfriend are staying at the same resort.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Late Night Legends
programme.desc: Guy explores how joints across America have a special way of keeping us up late and serving outrageous food.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: In the Family
programme.desc: Guy Fieri checks out a Baltimore diner that's famous for their pit beef with Duff Goldman.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Seaside Eats
programme.desc: Menu includes: fried clams; crab cakes; lobster chow mein.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Comfort Food Classics
programme.desc: Guy visits Charlotte and Rhode Island in search of home made comfort foods.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Wings, Dogs and Claws
programme.desc: Guy checks out the best homemade cooking in the country.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Ultimate Bacon Fest
programme.desc: Guy brings on the bacon, and it's not just for breakfast. From New York to California and Texas to Toronto, it's stacked in sandwiches, crumbled in ice cream, paired with pasta and loaded in mac and cheese.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Chicken and Pie
programme.desc: Guy Fieri is checking out some chicken and diving into some pie on this trip. In Portland, a Southern transplant is servin' up a killer chicken sandwich and hush puppies, and three sisters in Oklahoma City are puttin' their own funky spin on pizza.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Big Food, Small Towns
programme.desc: This trip, Guy Fieri's stopping in small towns to dig in to big-time eats. In Raymond, N.H., a blow-your-mind butchery loadin' up their burgers and crankin' out scratch-made corn dogs.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Super Sandwiches
programme.desc: Guy dives into a world of extravagant sandwiches that he won't soon forget.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Globetrottin'
programme.desc: Guy travels to Los Angeles to try traditional El Salvadoran pork stew called Adobada.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Porkapalooza
programme.desc: Guy goes coast to coast to try pulled pork and andouille sausage.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Chicken and Pie
programme.desc: Guy Fieri is checking out some chicken and diving into some pie on this trip. In Portland, a Southern transplant is servin' up a killer chicken sandwich and hush puppies, and three sisters in Oklahoma City are puttin' their own funky spin on pizza.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Layers of Flavor
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's firin' up the grill and stacking up the flavour. In Toronto, Canada, the restored diner cooking up pork belly, a mac and cheese burger and a Christmas burger.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Wildest Joints
programme.desc: On DDD, Guy has seen it all, and he has the scoop on the some of the wackiest and wildest joints out there. These joints may be wacky, but the food is off the chain.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: From Big Burgers To Little Italy
programme.desc: On this trip, Guy Fieri's going from the bomb burgers to a taste of Italy. In Little Rock, Ark., a funky joint pairing their craft brews with all kinds of on-the-bun creations.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Twists and Traditions
programme.desc: Guy visits a joint next to a farmfield and a bait and tackle shop turned dinner.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Extra Helpings
programme.desc: This trip, it's an exclusive peek at the lost footage of DDD: the places Guy Fieri's visited before, but all-new dishes never seen until now. Guy's digging in to money mussels, crispy pork skin and a lights-out lamb sandwich.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Brain Freeze
programme.desc: Guy Fieri rolls out for ice cream, Triple D style: With visits to a Norfolk, Va. Drive-In for an original waffle cone, an Arizona creamery making Italian gelato in all flavours and a New Orleans favourite doing huge sundaes with 400 flavours.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: All Kinds of Fast Food
programme.desc: Guy Fieri tracks down fast food done right: In New Mexico, legendary green chile cheeseburgers; in Omaha, deep fried tacos and in Connecticut, scratch made combo hotdogs.

programme.title: The Kitchen: Retro Remakes
programme.desc: The Kitchen gives retro recipes some modern upgrades, starting with Geoffrey Zakarian's new-style steak Diane. The hosts put old-school kitchen rules to the test and share their own tips and then Sunny Anderson makes her famous pigs-in-a-blanket.

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen: Picnic at the Vineyard
programme.desc: Trisha Yearwood is wining and dining her friends who are visiting from Las Vegas. They're headed to Arrington Vineyards, co-owned by Trisha's friend, country singer Kix Brooks, and Trisha makes a picnic with roasted beet and dill dip and pasta salad.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm: Meaty Magic
programme.desc: Molly Yeh is sharing her juiciest, meatiest recipes of all time, starting with her fried chicken sandwiches and pork sticky ribs. She also makes rhubarb short ribs, hearty orecchiette with broccolini and sausage and crispy corned beef hash waffles.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Home Sweet Home: Easy Weeknight Dinners
programme.desc: Ree has four awesome, easy dinners on the menu at the ranch. She shares Cajun surf and turf pasta and a fast pineapple chicken stir-fry. Then, Ree makes shortcut broccoli and tomato flatbread pizzas and a street corn quesadilla.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Girls' Night In
programme.desc: Ree Drummond is hosting a girls' night at the lodge, complete with a tasty spread of canapes and cocktails. She makes citrus shrimp nachos and zucchini quinoa cakes with herbed yogurt.

programme.title: The Kitchen: Our Best Big Batch Recipes
programme.desc: The Kitchen is making big batch recipes that are perfect for meal prep or family dinners. Jeff Mauro starts with his escarole, sausage, peppers and beans cheat sheet on the grill. Then, Geoffrey Zakarian makes a big batch of his Ratatouille.

programme.title: Delicious Miss Brown: Berry Delicious Brunch

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen: Bring on the Meat

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Music and Mayhem in the Market

programme.title: Selling the Big Easy: Bucktown Bungalow vs. Spanish Colonial

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home: New Love, New Home

programme.title: House Hunters: Character or Compromise
programme.desc: She dreams of a quirky home with character in Charlottesville, Virginia. But her ultra-analytical husband keeps finding reasons to torpedo every option.

programme.title: House Hunters: Spender Versus Saver in Nashville

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home: Bangor or Bust

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home: Scratch Offs: League City Limits
programme.desc: A couple's $1 million win is the perfect chance to ditch their small home and have plenty of space for their teenagers to spread out.

programme.title: Unsellable Houses: No Appeal to Curb Appeal
programme.desc: A couple that's desperate to sell their bungalow after receiving no offers calls on real estate experts and twins Leslie and Lyndsay. The home needs some love to make it sellable, but the stakes are raised when the twins invest money to make improvements.

programme.title: Unsellable Houses: Lake House Update
programme.desc: A woman who cares for her ailing father is struggling to sell her home in a desirable neighborhood. Leslie and Lyndsay jump at the opportunity to transform the outdated property into an industrial-chic showstopper that's perfect for a high-end buyer.

programme.title: Unsellable Houses: Split-level Struggle
programme.desc: Before a couple can buy their dream home, they must sell their outdated split level, and they're having trouble getting buyers in the door. Lyndsay and Leslie bring the home up to date with sleek, modern touches and minimalist elements.

programme.title: Unsellable Houses: Empty Nest Turned Family Retreat
programme.desc: A dad and his two adult daughters are ready to move on in life, but they're struggling to sell their family home. Leslie and Lyndsay work to transform their dated, 1990s property into a coastal retreat that will attract a brand-new family.

programme.title: Unsellable Houses: Condo Cleanup
programme.desc: A young millennial's recent home improvement projects have made it hard for her to sell her condo. Twins Leslie and Lyndsay transform her DIY disaster into a hip, modern home, perfect for a first-time home buyer.

programme.title: Unsellable Houses: Rough Rambler Reno
programme.desc: A young family has outgrown their home, but major exterior issues and a dark interior are keeping it from being sold. Leslie and Lyndsay brighten and repair the outdated rambler, but pricing it right will be difficult with no comps in the neighborhood.

programme.title: Unsellable Houses: Rental Property Reno
programme.desc: A contractor is desperate to sell his rental property that's a real wreck. When he's tempted to overspend on the renovation, twins Leslie and Lyndsay help steer Jeff toward a more budget-friendly makeover with an eclectic style.

programme.title: Unsellable Houses: Road House to Show House
programme.desc: Leslie and Lyndsay help a family struggling to sell their roadside rambler. Hoping to distract buyers from the road noise outside, the twins make some bold design choices to turn the dated ranch house into a stylish home that a new family will love.

programme.title: Unsellable Houses: Better Than New
programme.desc: A couple wants to sell their home and move to the mountains, but they can't compete with new homes in their neighborhood. Lyndsay and Leslie update the house with a rustic style so it can contend with the new construction and attract high-end buyers.

programme.title: Unsellable Houses: Moving Sale Makeover
programme.desc: A couple is moving out of state for work and needs Leslie and Lyndsay's help to sell their home. The twins revamp their outdated ranch with a modern farmhouse style designed to reel in buyers who love to entertain.

programme.title: Good Bones: The Cottage Catastrophe
programme.desc: Mina and Karen return to the Old Southside neighborhood to renovate a crusty cottage that's been empty for years. When an unexpected disaster hits, the duo must rethink their entire plan and create a beautiful home that will turn a profit.

programme.title: Good Bones: Mina's East Street Investment
programme.desc: Mina and Steve think it's time to renovate a rental property they purchased three years ago so they can sell it for Jack's college fund. Karen and Mina formulate a plan to transform the house into an urban Hampton's retreat with marble and wood shingles.

programme.title: Good Bones: The Boho Bungalow

programme.desc: A bar owner resorts to an exorcism after his pregnant wife is attacked by an angry entity, a family seeks help after their dog is literally scared to death and a young boy is haunted by a ghost with evil intentions.

programme.title: Believers: Buyer Beware
programme.desc: An antiques dealer posts videos of his collectibles breaking on their own, a single mother discovers her real-life dollhouse is a living nightmare, and a teenaged girl and her would-be stepsister bond over a terrifying haunting recorded on her phone.

programme.title: Believers: Nervous Wreck
programme.desc: A wrecking yard owner is shocked to see a ghost on a security camera, a retired schoolteacher's wife is attacked by a vengeful spirit and a mother and son search for a paranormal voice captured on a chilling audio file.

programme.title: Don't Be Tardy...: Performance Anxiety
programme.desc: As Kim's Pride appearance approaches, her fear magnifies, and she worries, even with her family rallying behind her and giving her the courage to unleash her new song on the world. Also, the entire family is in flux with all the changes happening.

programme.title: Movie: Hitch
programme.desc: While helping his latest client, a professional 'date doctor' falls for a journalist.

programme.title: Movie: Fifty Shades of Grey
programme.desc: A literature student falls for a wealthy young entrepreneur, who makes clear that any relations between the two of them will be on his own terms. She soon comes to learn of his singular tastes and his need to be completely in control.

programme.title: Movie: Fifty Shades Darker
programme.desc: Christian approaches Ana and asks her to give him a second chance. She agrees with one condition: this time, there isn't going to be any rules or punishments. They start to build trust, but figures from Christian's past threaten to tear them apart.

programme.title: NCIS: Los Angeles: Internal Affairs
programme.desc: While Deeks is under arrest and interrogated for the murder of his former partner, the team races to try and prove his innocence.

programme.title: NCIS: Los Angeles: Cancel Christmas
programme.desc: When a suspected North Korean spy is poisoned and hit by a truck carrying Christmas trees, the team must search for who is responsible for smuggling spies into the country. Also, Deeks and Kensi try to find a way to include their mothers at Christmas.

programme.title: NCIS: Los Angeles: Core Values
programme.desc: The team goes undercover at a decommissioned nuclear power plant to investigate the radiation poisoning of a Gunnery Sergeant moonlighting as a security guard.

programme.title: NCIS: Los Angeles: Angels and Daemons
programme.desc: The team investigates the murder of tech entrepreneur turned capitalist who secretly developed a daemon, a background computer program that allows for undetectable data collection.

programme.title: NCIS: Los Angeles: Come Back
programme.desc: When Kensi and Deeks announce to the team they are moving in together, coincidentally, Hetty assigns them to protection detail for Jack, Kensi's ex-fiancé, who is in possession of a list containing import contacts in Afghanistan.

programme.title: NCIS: Los Angeles: Matryoshka (Part 1)
programme.desc: In order to locate Arkady in Russia, the team goes undercover with his daughter, at a gala in Los Angeles to gain access to the Russian Consul General's computer.

programme.title: NCIS: Los Angeles: Matryoshka (Part 2)
programme.desc: While they're in Russia, Callen, Sam and Anna craft a plan to break Anna's father and his CIA companion out of prison, Also, Special Agent G. Callen finally learns what the 'G' in his name stands for, and in L.A., Kensi and Deeks take Eric into the field.

programme.title: NCIS: Los Angeles: Revenge Deferred
programme.desc: After extensive surveillance footage of Sam's family is found in Africa, Sam and Callen fly there to determine who is responsible and for what purpose. Also, Sam's family is moved from their home to safe house.

programme.title: NCIS: Los Angeles: Exchange Rate
programme.desc: When a convicted Cuban spy escapes U.S. custody just before he is set to return to his country in a prisoner exchange, the team is shocked to learn that Anna helped him break out. Also, Deeks admits to Kensi that he thinks she is too messy.

programme.title: NCIS: Los Angeles: The Seventh Child
programme.desc: Callen and the team try to save a child in imminent danger who has been brainwashed by a terrorist cell. Also, Deeks and Kensi discuss having children.

programme.title: NCIS: Los Angeles: Seoul Man
programme.desc: While assigned to protective details for the commander of the Pacific Command, the team searches for a North Korean spy.

programme.title: NCIS: Los Angeles: Head of the Snake
programme.desc: After operational psychologist Nate Getz fails to check in with Hetty while working undercover on a mission linking organized crime to terrorism, the team learns he is working with an infamous crime leader.

programme.title: NCIS: Los Angeles: Granger, O.
programme.desc: As Granger escorts Jennifer Kim back to Los Angeles, he interrogates her regarding a North Korean spy, and she admits to knowing he is her father.

programme.title: NCIS: Los Angeles: Where There's Smoke
programme.desc: Sam and Callen go undercover as firefighters when top secret information about suspected terrorists is stolen from a secure Department of Defense container at the site of a fire.

programme.title: NCIS: Los Angeles: Talion
programme.desc: When Sam receives a distress code from his son, Aiden, that his school has been taken over by an extremist group, the team rushes to San Francisco to protect him and free the hostages.

programme.title: Movie: Fifty Shades of Grey

programme.title: Swamp People: Brutus the Cannibal
programme.desc: Karma finds its way to Chase. Daniel reveals a secret honey hole. Frenchy and Gee fight a cannibal. Glenn decides to start a new business.

programme.title: Swamp People: Swamp on Fire
programme.desc: Daniel and Big Tee risk a trip into the unprotected marsh lands on the hottest day of the season, while Troy and Terral lure monsters into shady areas. Willie teaches his son to hunt with a treble hook and Ashley tries to fill her boat.

programme.title: Swamp People: Final Showdown
programme.desc: Troy and Terral try to tag out in a cursed bayou, while Jacob and Don chase monsters into deep waters. Elsewhere, Daniel's airboat breaks down in the marsh as Joey and Zak try to keep the family on track.

programme.title: Swamp People: Graduation Day

programme.title: God Code
programme.desc: St. Petersburg, Russia keeps watch over the Leningrad Codex, the oldest complete text of the Hebrew Bible in the world. Within its pages, antiquities expert Timothy Smith believes there lies an intricate code, one no present in later translations.

programme.desc: After finding a box of mementos, Gramma tells the kids the story of her greatest adventure. While the Greens are away, the animals compete to see who will rule the farm.

programme.title: Liv and Maddie: Home Run-A-Rooney

programme.title: Buried in the Backyard: Blood in the Backyard
programme.desc: A mom and her newborn inexplicably vanish from their California home. When blood is discovered in their backyard, a grieving father is scrutinized and investigators race against the clock to bring this mother and child home before it's too late.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Footprint in the Dust
programme.desc: Susie Casey was an outgoing mother of four going through a divorce. She was twenty steps from her front door when she vanished. Police were investigating three men in her life. They were all there the morning of her murder.

programme.desc: After the brutal attack of a single mother in her own home, authorities work for two decades to uncover an unlikely criminal who uses the power of lust as a deadly weapon.

programme.desc: A group of highly skilled mercenaries travel to South America to overthrow the dictator of a small island. After they arrive the team is challenged by local rebels.

programme.title: Chimp Sanctuary

programme.title: Nature's Great Events: The Great Melt
programme.desc: The summer melt of Arctic ice provides opportunities for millions of animals, including narwhal, beluga whales, families of Arctic foxes and vast colonies of seabirds. But for polar bears, it's the toughest time of year.

programme.title: Nature's Great Events: The Great Salmon Run
programme.desc: A spectacular natural event takes place in North America every year as hundreds of millions of salmon return from the Pacific Ocean to the mountain streams where they were born. The salmon must overcome fierce torrents and leap over waterfalls.

programme.title: Nature's Great Events: The Great Tide
programme.desc: The Sardine Run is the world's largest gathering of predators; each winter a mighty army of ocean predators hunt the sardines gathering along South Africa's eastern coast; with the Run becoming less stable it has effects that run right up the food chain.

programme.title: Nature's Great Events: The Great Flood
programme.desc: The yearly flood of the Okavango Delta turns 4,000 square miles of arid plains into wetland.

programme.title: Nature's Great Events: The Great Migration
programme.desc: Each year, over a million wildebeest and zebra invade the Serengeti grasslands making it a paradise for the predators that live there. We follow the moving story of one lion family's struggle to survive.

programme.title: Nature's Great Events: The Great Feast
programme.desc: Every summer in the seas off Alaska, humpback whales, sea lions and killer whales depend on an explosion of plant life: the plankton bloom. It transforms these seas into the richest on Earth.

programme.title: Wild West: Desert Heartlands
programme.desc: Travel from the cold deserts of Nevada to the giant cactus-studded lands of Arizona and the scorching Mojave Desert in California. Discover how some of America's most iconic animals like mustangs and coyotes have learned to survive.

programme.title: Wild West: The High Country
programme.desc: America's High Country is the last of grizzly bears and giant trees, of frigid winters and scorching summers, of tough ranchers and gold-rush fever. From the Rockies to the Sierra Nevada, survival in this land of extreme seasons demands endurance.

programme.title: Wild West: Restless Shores
programme.desc: Tectonic forces shape all life here, creating stunning landscapes like the San Andreas Fault, reaching north to the Pacific coast. Elephant seals battle it out for mates and grey whales form a unique friendship with a small community of people.

programme.title: Africa: Kalahari
programme.desc: In Africa's ancient southwest corner, two deserts sit side by side; water is in short supply, yet these deserts are full of life because the creatures that live there have turned the rules of survival on their head.

programme.title: Africa: Savannah
programme.desc: East Africa is a land that is constantly changing. In order to survive, creatures must be able to deal with twists and turns, no matter how hostile and unpredictable. This unique and varied land is a haven for life.

programme.title: Sharkcano
programme.desc: Dr. Michael Heithaus sets out to reveal the connection between sharks and volcanoes.

programme.title: Man vs. Shark
programme.desc: Marine biologist attempts to get bitten by a deadly tiger shark and survive.

programme.title: Sharks vs. Dolphins: Blood Battle
programme.desc: There’s a war being waged beneath the waves: sharks versus dolphins.

programme.title: Shark vs Predator
programme.desc: Sharks are rulers of the aquatic world, molded by evolution into a fierce predator. Few dare to challenge the king of the ocean, but we investigate what kinds of animals would be daring enough to take on these killing machines.

programme.title: World's Biggest Great White? Expedition Hawaii
programme.desc: After three great whites are spotted off Oahu, could another be lurking just below the surface?

programme.title: Cannibal Sharks
programme.desc: The world’s leading scientists lead an investigation into the shocking world of Cannibal Sharks.

programme.title: United Sharks of America: Shark Bite Capitals
programme.desc: American beaches are under attack…by sharks. In the last 10 years the number of sightings and attacks has grown.

programme.title: World's Weirdest: Sharks!
programme.desc: Discover the odd behaviours of sharks of all sizes, from the vicious hunters to the scrappy bottom-feeders, as they have never been seen before.

programme.desc: Learn about the amazing variety of species on the banks of the Nile, including an aerial view of the never-before-filmed great antelope migration of South Sudan.

programme.title: The Nile: River of Kings
programme.desc: The Ethiopian Highlands are the birthplace of the Blue Nile, the greatest tributary and largest water supplier to the mighty Nile.

programme.title: The Nile: Paradise Found
programme.desc: The waters of the Nile come from distant lands: the rugged mountains of Ethiopia, springs in the rainforest and Lake Victoria. The Nile has many sources and the journey through them reveals colourful, fascinating creatures along the way.

programme.title: Wild Egypt

programme.title: Unearthed: Lost World of Easter Island
programme.desc: The mysterious statues of Easter Island were built by one of the world's strangest and most isolated civilizations, and today, new evidence reveals why they were built and what caused Easter Island's sudden downfall.

programme.title: Unearthed: Wrath of Attila the Hun
programme.desc: New evidence reveals if Attila the Hun was responsible for the fall of the Roman Empire.

programme.title: Unearthed: Lost World of Atlantis
programme.desc: New discoveries on a strange island in the Mediterranean might offer new clues in the hunt for Atlantis. Using cutting-edge archaeological methods, experts reveal the apocalyptic event that destroyed this long-lost civilization.

programme.title: Unearthed: Mystery of the Ice Mummy
programme.desc: The Iceman is the world's oldest and most perfectly preserved mummy, and brand-new cutting-edge forensic technology is revealing his darkest secrets; these discoveries could change everything we know about the humans who lived 5,000 years ago.

programme.title: Unearthed: Curse of the Seventh Wonder
programme.desc: The Lighthouse of Alexandria is one of the world's original Seven Wonders, but it could have been home to a mysterious superweapon, and using cutting-edge tech, experts investigate the secrets of this fabled death ray and its long-lost home.

programme.title: Unearthed: Mysteries in the Alien Desert
programme.desc: The Nazca Lines in Peru are mysterious giant symbols; hundreds of alien looking drawings created more than 1000 years ago. Learn why their creators made vast images in the desert that only make sense from the air.

programme.title: Unearthed: Tower of Babel: The New Evidence
programme.desc: The Tower of Babel is one of the most famous stories of the Bible, and to find out if it really existed, archaeologists use cutting-edge tech and the latest science to investigate how ancient engineers could have built such an extraordinary megastructure.

programme.title: Unearthed: Vesuvius's Secret Victim
programme.desc: Scientists are using cutting edge technology to unearth a second city that, like the well-known city of Pompeii, was destroyed when Vesuvius erupted in 79 AD. This new town is revealed to be one of the most well-preserved Roman towns on earth.

programme.title: Unearthed: Ghosts of the Wild West
programme.desc: The gunfight at Tombstone's OK Corral turned Wyatt Earp into an American folk hero, and to find what really happened here, experts use the newest tech to discover what caused the fatal shootout and what it reveals about the dark secrets of the Wild West.

programme.title: Unearthed: Pompeii's Evil Twin
programme.desc: The lost city of Baiae was the Las Vegas of the ancient world, until a mysterious calamity caused it to sink into the sea. New discoveries reveal the secrets of this sin city that, like Pompeii, some experts believe was destroyed by a supervolcano.

programme.title: Unearthed: Egypt's Buried City
programme.desc: There's a lost city buried in the Sahara, and evidence reveals it's home to Nefertiti, Tutankhamun, and the forbidden god of an outlawed religion. Experts uncover the secret doomsday that caused this strange place to disappear.

programme.title: Unearthed: Empire State Building: The New Secrets
programme.desc: Cutting-edge tech helps experts explore The Empire State Building, one of the wonders of the modern world, like never before, revealing the secrets of its construction and the mysteries hidden deep in its foundation.

programme.title: Unearthed: Dead Sea Scrolls: The Dark Truth
programme.desc: The Dead Sea Scrolls are one of the Holy Land's greatest mysteries, but new discoveries might finally reveal the hidden meaning behind the strange texts, and as experts get closer to unmasking their author, they find clues of an ancient apocalypse.

programme.title: The Wonderland Murders: Pacific Terror
programme.desc: When Detective Molly Daul works two homicides back to back, she realizes she's dealing with a sexual predator who targets trusting young women. Arrested before he can kill again in Seattle, his chilling confession remains with Molly to this day.

programme.title: The Wonderland Murders: Unhinged
programme.desc: Three college students believe it's their calling to rid Portland of 'its sinners,' committing 'overkill' murders to make their point.

programme.title: The Wonderland Murders: Secrets in the Mist
programme.desc: When Ashley Benson is found murdered in a trendy Portland hotel, detectives quickly dial in on three suspects, all of whom have been romantically linked to Ashley while Ashley's parents must come to grips with their daughter's secret life.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Hollywood Horror Story
programme.desc: A mother’s intuition that something is wrong with her daughter leads Los Angeles police to a house of horrors. Inside, they found Iana Kasian, 30, brutally murdered. Where the trail of blood led them could be the subject of a movie script or horror novel.

programme.title: The West Memphis Three: An ID Murder Mystery: The Devil's Work
programme.desc: Three eight-year-old boys are murdered, mutilated and hogtied in a watery ditch in West Memphis, Arkansas. Police suspect three teenagers they believe have ties to Satanism. Soon, locals come forward with startling information.

programme.title: The West Memphis Three: An ID Murder Mystery: Satanic Panic
programme.desc: When Jessie Misskelley confesses to the murder of three young boys, he and his friends are arrested, sending West Memphis into a frenzy. The misfit teens are put on trial and their alleged satanic beliefs are at the heart of the prosecution's case.

programme.title: The West Memphis Three: An ID Murder Mystery: Triple Threat
programme.desc: Damien and Jason are found guilty of the triple child murder. Soon, a worldwide movement arises to prove their innocence and new evidence emerges to bolster their case.

programme.title: The West Memphis Three: An ID Murder Mystery: The Devil's Work
programme.desc: Three eight-year-old boys are murdered, mutilated and hogtied in a watery ditch in West Memphis, Arkansas. Police suspect three teenagers they believe have ties to Satanism. Soon, locals come forward with startling information.

programme.title: The West Memphis Three: An ID Murder Mystery: Satanic Panic
programme.desc: When Jessie Misskelley confesses to the murder of three young boys, he and his friends are arrested, sending West Memphis into a frenzy. The misfit teens are put on trial and their alleged satanic beliefs are at the heart of the prosecution's case.

programme.title: The West Memphis Three: An ID Murder Mystery: Triple Threat
programme.desc: Damien and Jason are found guilty of the triple child murder. Soon, a worldwide movement arises to prove their innocence and new evidence emerges to bolster their case.

programme.title: 48 Hours: The DNA of a Killer
programme.desc: Police have DNA evidence from a brutal murder but can't match a killer.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Death After Midnight
programme.desc: A married mother of three was found with a single gunshot wound to her head. Unknown was how she was shot, if it was suicide or murder. The coroner ruled it a suicide but a call from a source re-opened the case with the husband arrested.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Spies, Lies and Secrets
programme.desc: To his parents, Shane Todd was a brilliant, high-tech engineer at a Singapore company who was murdered because he was unwilling to share secrets that could harm the United States. To police in Singapore, he was an American who killed himself.

programme.title: Murder by Numbers: You Could Be Next
programme.desc: Theories arise when a sheriff's wife opens a door to a blaze of gunfire. When more citizens are shot at their front doors, everyone's left wondering who's next.

programme.title: Murder by Numbers: Friend of the Devil
programme.desc: Within a month, four men in Orange County are brutally stabbed by a mysterious man. No one makes a connection to a gruesome double murder of a mother and son two months earlier, except the man sitting in prison for killing his own family.

programme.title: Murder by Numbers: Clown Mask Murders
programme.desc: A man is murdered by an intruder leaving his wife to witness a disturbing detail: the killer was wearing a clown mask. And when three more are killed by the same deranged clown, police realize they're dealing with a serial killer.

programme.title: Murder by Numbers: Bound By Blood
programme.desc: The busy streets of Atlanta, GA are shaken as horror of the 'Necktie Killer' strikes the city with fear. Detectives from neighboring counties piece together correlative clues and distinctive apparel left behind at each crime scene.

programme.title: The Devil Speaks: Set Me Free
programme.desc: When Detectives looking for missing Mom, Tami Reay find blood in her car they arrest her husband, Brad. But then they receive a tip off, pointing the finger at an entirely new suspect.

programme.title: The Devil Speaks: Killer Confession
programme.desc: Melissa Atkin is found bound and murdered in her home in Smyrna, Tennessee. Eventually, the investigation focuses in on two individuals, with a series of recorded phone calls proving vital in exonerating one of them, whilst incriminating the other.

programme.title: The Devil Speaks: No Mercy
programme.desc: A man is found murdered in what appears to be a home-invasion robbery. Closer inspection makes detectives believe it was a personal attack, and look for suspects, including his wife.

programme.title: The Devil Speaks: Killer Reputation
programme.desc: Dr. Margo Prade is shot to death in the parking lot of her own medical practice in Akron, Ohio, and the senseless act shocks the city. Police are baffled. Until they discover that Margo's phone calls were being secretly recorded.

programme.title: The Devil Speaks: Bloodlines
programme.desc: An elderly couple are found murdered in their home. At first it's believed to be a robbery-gone-wrong until detectives realize it may me a family member with a grudge.

programme.title: See No Evil: All Eyes on Megan
programme.desc: When a teenager goes missing from her local Walmart, detectives struggle for leads. But then surveillance cameras reveal terrifying footage of a prowler kidnapping her, transforming this investigation into a desperate race to bring her home alive.

programme.title: See No Evil: Night Shift
programme.desc: 18-year-old Kyle Farishian is working the late shift at a 7-Eleven on Halloween when he is brutally attacked by a masked assailant. With no physical evidence, detectives scrutinize the convenience store's surveillance footage for any clues.

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: Merchant of Death
programme.desc: The DEA are running an undercover mission codenamed 'Operation Relentless.' This is a multi-million dollar, international sting with one aim, to take down Russian arms dealer Viktor Bout also known as the Merchant of Death.

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: The Black Widow
programme.desc: A cocaine empire triggers a tidal wave of deaths across the United States. Behind this rampage is a bloodthirsty female psychopath who kills for fun. Known as The Black Widow, this is the true story of Griselda Blanco and how she's brought to justice.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got Caught in the Shower
programme.desc: Richard Garber thinks he has gotten away with murder, after he bludgeons a neighbour to death. But when he becomes the lead suspect in the case, Garber hits the road spending eight months dodging the Feds and sneaking cash from his girlfriend.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got Hammered on a Sailboat
programme.desc: A fugitive murders a man and flees to New York, where he plans a daring escape, while another breaks out of jail by overpowering a guard.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Run to Costa Rica
programme.desc: David Harden is a clean-cut businessman living a double life as a burglar. His drug habit forces him to commit more daring crimes until he gets caught. He runs to Costa Rica, pulling scams until a friend turns him in.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got a Gun Made of Toilet Paper
programme.desc: Kerry Silvers was facing 55 years in the slammer for robbery and battery, so he decided to escape. Along with two other prisoners they overpowered a few guards and were able to calmly walk out of prison.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Lock and Load
programme.desc: A Texas separatist group takes two hostages. Rangers are able to negotiate the release, however two members, Richard Keyes and Mike Matson get away, evading helicopters and dogs. Using an underground militia group, Keyes hides out in the woods undetected.

programme.desc: Stephanie and Virginia's wish list for a vacation home in Galveston, TX, includes an elevated deck and close proximity to fishing. They're working with a local agent to help them reel in a winner, but permit problems and unforeseen issues threaten things.

programme.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Next Up: Niagara
programme.desc: A couple seek a property along Lake Ontario in Niagara County that could be an escape for the family, but needs some work. They are no strangers to renovations, but with a tight budget they may have bitten off more than they can chew.

programme.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Making Memories on Lake Martin

programme.desc: A woman and her daughters relocate from Virginia Beach, VA, to the quaint beach town of Cape Charles. They find a charming fixer upper that will be perfect for their family but it's in need of some serious repairs.

programme.title: Flea Market Flip: Super Flippers!
programme.desc: Designing friends, Dani and Mo (aka the Wonder Twins), put their heroic flipping powers to the test against the Dynamic Duo of James and Delilah.

programme.title: Flea Market Flip: Married Metal Heads Take on Fierce Flippers
programme.desc: Best buds Anthony and Tonie are competing against married metal heads, Aaron and Angie. With $500 in hand, the teams hit the aisles of Brimfield Antique Show and Flea Market in Brimfield, Massachusetts.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Pump Up the Basement
programme.desc: Tamara updates a massive, but dark, kitchen in a 1978 Tudor home. She moves and enlarges the pantry and adds a banquette while brightening up the space.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Corbels and Chaos
programme.desc: Tamara sees great potential in a 1938 cottage with an unusual layout, unfinished renovation and no front door. She constructs a cathedral ceiling and creates two cedar corbels for the entrance. The cost of an egress window may crack her budget.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Skylight Surprise
programme.desc: Tamara struggles to install a full bath and enlarge the master suite as she continues to renovate the 1938 cottage. She successfully creates a hidden playroom in the kids' bedroom, but fails to win her dad's approval on her plan for the backyard shed.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: From Studs to Spindles
programme.desc: Tamara Day steps in to finish the renovation of a 1890s Craftsman-style home. This home was previously ripped down to the studs by a contractor before it was abandoned.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Book Lamps and Bubble Glass
programme.desc: Renovations on the 1890s Craftsman-style home continues as Tamara enlarges the master bedroom and creates a beautiful study. She runs into trouble when the antique tiles for the bathroom floor are not salvageable. Tamara finds a way to re-use old glass.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Clearwater Camp
programme.desc: The team take on a cabin in Industry, ME, that hasn't been touched since the 1970's. Loads of issues arise once the snow melts and they start digging in.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: The Hiltz Camp
programme.desc: Chase and his team are in the woods of New Sharon, Maine, to help Rod save his rundown camp from falling into the pristine Kimball Pond. He'd like to patch up the holes and get his wife to come back to the camp, which means a lot of hard work.

programme.title: Cupcake Wars: Hanson

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Operation Dinkelberg/ Spellementary School
programme.desc: Foop is back and trying to be the most popular kid at school.

programme.title: Movie: Batman vs. Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
programme.desc: The teenage mutant ninja turtles team up with Batman, Batgirl, and Robin when their enemy, The Shredder, teams up with Ra's Al Ghul.

programme.title: Movie: Power Rangers
programme.desc: Five teens are brought together when they discover they are to be the newest generation in a line of warriors known as the Power Rangers. Just as they begin to learn their abilities, the Earth is attacked by a powerful witch and former Power Ranger.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Keep Bikini Bottom Beautiful/ A Pal for Gary
programme.desc: Squidward cleans up the city of Bikini Bottom with 'help' from SpongeBob. SpongeBob brings Gary a pet that terrorizes him.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Chocolate With Nuts/ Superfriends
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Pat make extra money when they decide to sell chocolate bars door to door. Also, Mermaid Man and Barnacle Boy get into an fight.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Sailor Mouth/ Artist Unknown
programme.desc: Bob learns a 'bad' word off of a dumpster; Bob is Squid's only student for an art class.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Spongebob Meets the Strangler/ Pranks a Lot
programme.desc: SpongeBob turns in the littering Tattletale Strangler; SpongeBob and Patrick invest in a local prank shop's magic 'invisible spray'.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Whatever Happened to SpongeBob
programme.desc: SpongeBob tries to spend time with his friends but he ends up being a nuisance to everyone instead. They all tell him to go away, so with a heavy heart, he does just that.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Giant Squidward/ No Nose Knows
programme.desc: When Squidward gets spritzed with plant growth spray, he becomes monstrously huge. Patrick gets a nose.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Mooncation/ Mr. Krabs Takes a Vacation
programme.desc: SpongeBob house-sits for Sandy, and all is quiet until Patrick shows up. After losing their passes, SpongeBob and Squidward try to sneak backstage at the sold-out Kelpy G show.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: SquarePants Family Vacation
programme.desc: While on a family road trip to the Great Barrier Reef, SpongeBob and Patrick get lost and end up on the adventure of a lifetime.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Best Frenemies
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs teams up with Plankton when a smoothie store takes over Bikini Bottom.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Are You Happy Now?/ Planet of the Jellyfish
programme.desc: SpongeBob helps Squidward make a happiest memory for himself; SpongeBob and Sandy have to defeat an evil Jellien overlord who's replaced everyone in Bikini Bottom with clones.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: SB-129/ Karate Choppers
programme.desc: Squidward ends up in a freezer; Bob and Sandy's incessant karate sparring wreaks havoc.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Pull Up a Barrel/ Company Picnic
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs regales SpongeBob with tales from his old Navy days. Later, Mr. Krabs throws a company picnic to boost morale, but Plankton is hosting his own on the same day!

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Mall Girl Pearl/ Two Thumbs Down
programme.desc: Pearl gets a job to be cool like her friends, but the only store that's hiring is the lamest store at the mall. SpongeBob loses the use of his thumbs, and must get them back in working order before his entire life falls apart.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Sandy's Rocket/ Squeaky Boots
programme.desc: Bob and Pat accidentally launch Sandy's rocket ship into space; boots in lieu of pay.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Wormy/ Patty Hype
programme.desc: The gang thinks that Sandy's pet caterpillar has been consumed by a 'monster' butterfly; Bob markets his coloured crabcakes to the Krusty Krab's clientele.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Rise of the Turtles
programme.desc: When Splinter allows his teenage sons, the Mutant Ninja Turtles, to visit the surface for the first time, they discover that the surface world isn't as simple as it first appears.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Rise of the Turtles
programme.desc: When Splinter allows his teenage sons, the Mutant Ninja Turtles, to visit the surface for the first time, they discover that the surface world isn't as simple as it first appears.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Turtle Temper
programme.desc: Raphael loses his temper when he is insulted by a New Yorker named Vic.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: New Friend, Old Enemy
programme.desc: Michelangelo tries to prove humans can be friends with Turtles.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: I Think His Name Is Baxter Stockman
programme.desc: The Turtles battle Baxter, a derange inventor on their way to see a movie.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Metalhead
programme.desc: Donatello creates a remote-controlled robot turtle to fight in his place.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Monkey Brains
programme.desc: Donatello and April uncover a conspiracy involving a psychic monkey.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Never Say Xever
programme.desc: Leo fears his act of mercy has come back to haunt him when Xever holds a local noodle shop owner hostage.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Overlooked/ Wish Upon a Star
programme.desc: Against Simon's wishes, Alvin borrows his latest invention, an invisibility suit, only to get the zipper stuck. When Theodore wishes on a shooting star, the Chipmunks try to learn what the wish is so they can make it come true.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Spoiler-Itis/ Something's Fishy
programme.desc: When Alvin is accused of revealing spoilers for everyone's favorite TV show, he agrees not to speak for 24 hours. Alvin and Simon think Theodore's pet goldfish has died.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Jeanette's Secret Garden/ Treasure Hunt
programme.desc: Jeanette decides to plant a garden on the school grounds, but Bocarter manages to install vending machines instead.When Alvin finds a treasure map in Miss Croner's basement, the Chipmunks set off in search of lost treasure.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: A Is for Alien/ Jeanette Enchanted
programme.desc: When Theodore disappears from his bed, Alvin is positive that he has been kidnapped by aliens. The Chipmunks and Chipettes join forces in order to offer Jeanette a magical, fairy-tale birthday.

programme.title: Henry Danger: A Piñata Full of Death Bugs
programme.desc: When a dangerous piñata ends up at a kid's birthday party, Kid Danger and Captain Man must go undercover and step in before it's too late.

programme.title: Henry Danger: Love Muffin
programme.desc: When Captain Man suddenly announces he's getting married, Henry and Charlotte go searching for answers only to discover that things are not as they seem.

programme.title: Henry Danger: Scream Machine
programme.desc: When Charlotte's invention for The Gizmo Show is accidentally destroyed and then rebuilt, Charlotte worries that the attention she gets could expose Kid Danger and Captain Man's secret identity.

programme.title: Henry Danger: The Trouble With Frittles
programme.desc: Captain Man and Kid Danger find themselves in the middle of a debate over what is Swellview's favorite snack.

programme.title: Henry Danger: Mouth Candy
programme.desc: Jasper's enthusiasm in crime fighting leads him to send Captain Man and Kid Danger into incidents that are not crimes.

programme.title: Henry Danger: Gas or Fail
programme.desc: When Captain Man finds himself trapped underground, Henry must devise a way to sneak out of his school's standardized testing to save Ray.

programme.title: Henry Danger: Hour of Power
programme.desc: When Drex, a dangerous criminal who just escaped from Swellview prison, embarrasses Kid Danger and traps Captain Man in a helmet, Kid Danger must use the help of Schwoz to gain a superpower and defeat Drex.

programme.title: Henry Danger: JAM Session
programme.desc: When Ray hears that Piper is working on her anger issues, he makes a wager with Henry that he can make her lose her temper before the night ends.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Weirdmageddon 3: Take Back the Falls
programme.desc: Ford discovers Bill's true motives and then a final confrontation with Bill leads to the Pines family's ultimate fate and greatest sacrifice.

programme.title: Amphibia: Civil Wart/ Hop-Popular
programme.desc: Anne exposes Wartwood to a teen romance film, and the town is split on the movie's love triangle. After losing his stand, Hop Pop decides to run for mayor of Wartwood.

programme.title: Amphibia: Croak and Punishment/ Trip to the Archives
programme.desc: When Sprig's Blue Moon Shell is stolen, he and Anne investigate to find the crook. To prepare for Anne's quest, the Plantars go to the archives and accidentally get trapped!

programme.title: Big City Greens: Night Bill/ Cheap Snake
programme.desc: When Bill sneaks out at night with a mysterious duffel bag in tow, the kids hide in his truck to see where he goes. Cricket impulsively decides to buy a giant pet snake.

programme.title: DuckTales: Challenge of the Senior Junior Woodchucks!
programme.desc: Huey races against Violet in a challenge to be named Senior Junior Woodchuck. Scrooge and the family search for a secret Woodchuck treasure.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Mini-Maximum Trouble
programme.desc: When Fred runs into a string of bad luck, Megan reveals to Hiro that she's trying to uncover the true identities of Big Hero 6 for her school's newspaper.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Headhunters
programme.desc: When someone tampers with Mabel's life-size wax statue, she and Dipper set out to find the culprit. Meanwhile, Grunkle Stan mourns over the loss of his wax doppelganger.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Golf War
programme.desc: After being belittled by Pacifica one too many times, Mabel challenges her to a miniature golf-off which gets a tad out of control when some local residents offer their help.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Fight Fighters
programme.desc: After being challenged to a video game battle by Wendy's boyfriend Robbie, Dipper is shocked when his favourite playable fighter, Rumble McSkirmish, comes to life to defend him. Dipper soon loses control over Rumble and has to find a way to stop him.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Dungeons, Dungeons and More Dungeons
programme.desc: Dipper finds an unlikely friend to join him with his newest obsession, a board game called 'Dungeons, Dungeons & More Dungeons.'

programme.title: Beyblade Burst Rise: Rising Ferocity! Tag Battle!
Pokémon: Sun & Moon - Ultra Adventures: Alola, Alola!
programme.desc: At the start of their break, the students have visitors, and Ash can’t believe his eyes.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Soos and the Real Girl
programme.desc: When Soos finds himself in need of a date for his cousin Reggie's engagement party, he looks to a dating simulator game to help him talk to girls.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Town Where Everyone Was Nice!
programme.desc: Donald reunites with his band, The Three Caballeros, while the family takes in the sites of a Brazilian town with a dark secret.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: The Bot-Fighter
programme.desc: Hiro, Baymax and the rest of the Big Hero 6 team continue their journey to San Fransokyo.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Dipper vs. Manliness
programme.desc: In a quest to attain manliness, Dipper ventures into the forest to battle the notorious Multi-Bear. Mabel tries to teach Grunkle Stan how to be attractive to women, particularly the waitress in the local diner, Lazy Susan.

programme.title: The Owl House: A Lying Witch and a Warden
programme.desc: When 14-year-old outcast Luz discovers a portal to a new world, she meets a witch, Eda, and a demon named King. In order to get home, Luz has to help them with a mission.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Garage Tales/ Animal Farm
programme.desc: After finding a box of mementos, Gramma tells the kids the story of her greatest adventure. While the Greens are away, the animals compete to see who will rule the farm.

programme.title: Amphibia: Handy Anne/ Fort in the Road
programme.desc: Worried that something bad could happen while they are in Newtopia, Anne decides to disaster-proof the farm. Later, Sprig longs for exotic road trip adventures, but Hop Pop's strict road rules threaten to spoil all of his fun plans.

programme.title: Amphibia: Quarreler's Pass/ Toadcatcher
programme.desc: Hop Pop drops Sprig and Polly off at an obstacle-filled mountain trail designed to help them get along. Sasha and Grime must reconcile their differences to escape Newtopia's most skilled warrior, General Yunnan.

programme.title: Amphibia: Swamp and Sensibility/ Wax Museum
programme.desc: When Anne discovers an old friend who has been living a double life, she becomes fixated on helping him be his true self. The family visits a mysterious roadside oddities museum where every treasure comes with a price.

programme.title: Amphibia: The Ballad of Hopediah Plantar/ Anne Hunter
programme.desc: Hop Pop's efforts to be hailed as a hero amongst some small-town folks backfires when he stands up to the wrong family. Then, when the family is in danger, Anne must put her self-consciousness aside in order to learn the true way of the hunter.

programme.title: Amphibia: Truck Stop Polly/ A Caravan Named Desire
programme.desc: Feeling unappreciated by her family, Polly hatches a plan to make them pay attention to her. Hop Pop signs the family up to join a traveling theater troupe, hoping to realize his dream of being an actor.

programme.title: Amphibia: Marcy at the Gates
programme.desc: The family must defeat an entire ant army before they enter Newtopia.

programme.title: Amphibia: Scavenger Hunt/ The Plantars Check In
programme.desc: Anne, Sprig and Marcy receive a mysterious message from the king of Newtopia that sends them on a puzzle-solving mission. Anne finally meets with King Andrias and tries to enlist his help in getting back home.

programme.title: Amphibia: Lost in Newtopia/ Sprig Gets Schooled
programme.desc: Anne and Polly vow to experience the city like locals but end up on a wild ride through the streets of Newtopia. Sprig is offered a spot at Newtopia University.

programme.title: Amphibia: Hop Luck / Stakeout
programme.desc: To win a village cooking contest, Anne leads the family on a quest to make pizza; Sprig tricks Anne and Hop Pop into going on a stakeout in order to make them get along.

programme.title: Amphibia: Snow Day/ Cracking Mrs. Croaker
programme.desc: When a winter cold snap freezes all the frogs in Wartwood, Anne must protect the townspeople. In an effort to make Mrs. Croaker like him, Sprig digs up a secret from her past.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Tagging a Suspect
programme.desc: Bomb attacks typically pose a difficult problem for investigators to solve due to the absence of the attacker and a damaged crime scene, but forensic scientists manage to uncover miniscule pieces of plastic that lead straight to the killer.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: Boston Marathon: The Manhunt (Part 2)
programme.desc: With the Boston Bombing suspects identified as domestic terrorist brothers, the manhunt begins, a terrifying crime spree ensues, and new information sheds light on the heinous crime.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Pressed for Crime

programme.title: Forensic Files: Finger Pane

programme.title: Forensic Files: Traffic Violations

programme.title: Forensic Files: Brotherly Love
